title: UK to offer free Meningitis B vaccine to 1 million young people after deadly outbreaks
summary_full: A major NHS programme will offer the meningitis B vaccine to around one million young people across the UK, including Year 13 students and those under 25 starting university. This initiative aims to protect vulnerable individuals entering environments where the disease spreads easily, following recent life-claiming outbreaks.
